programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Elektra unwittingly takes part in her former teacher's test when she protects a former target and his daughter from "The Hand," a sinister crime syndicate of martial arts fighters.

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney Baze mysteriously disappears and law enforcement doesn't follow through fast enough, his older brother Russell takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars Lindstrom is an akwardly shy young man in a small town who finally brings home the girl of his dreams to his brother and sister-in-law's home. The only problem is that she's not real - she's a sex doll.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A rookie cop is assigned to the 118 Precinct in the same district where he grew up. The Precinct Captain starts receiving letters about two unsolved murders that happened many years ago in the housing projects when the rookie cop was just a kid.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Foxwoods World Poker Finals S8
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: World Poker Tour: WPT Premier League - Part 2
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Bellagio Cup VI - Part 1
programme.desc: Action kicks off with televised final table of six in the WPT Bellagio Cup VI, including Phil Ivey and Justin Smith.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Legends of Poker
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour Legends of Poker final table is set, with Andy Frankenberger and Jared Jaffee headlining.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata Poker Open
programme.desc: A massive field of 1,042 entries turned up for the WPT Borgata Poker Open, and just six players remain in contention for the $734,000 top prize.

programme.title: The Raven
programme.desc: The sorcerer Craven learns from fellow magician Dr. Bedlo that his supposedly dead wife is alive and living at the castle of master sorcerer Dr. Scarabus.

programme.title: The Bikini Carwash Company 1
programme.desc: Women go topless at a carwash company in order to increase business.

programme.title: Blood Orgy of the She-Devils
programme.desc: Lorraine and Mark enter the world of witchcraft where Mara foretells the future and helps them remember their past lives.

programme.title: Auntie Lee's Meat Pies
programme.desc: A devil-worshiping woman sends out her four beautiful nieces to lure men back to her place so they can be killed, ground up and sold as meat pies.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: WARRIOR tells the moving and inspirational story of the Conlon family, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) and Paddy (Nick Nolte), who find redemption in the ring as they fight to repair themselves and their family.

programme.title: Shadow Warriors: Assault on Devil's Island
programme.desc: Hulk Hogan leads an elite Navy SEAL team chosen for an audacious mission to rescue a group of Americans being held captive by a drug lord's soldiers, who want their leader released.

programme.title: Escape Plan: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone, Arnold Schwarzenegger, and 50 Cent star as inmates who must break out of a top secret, high-security prison in this non-stop action-thriller.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: Spring Break Nightmare
programme.desc: It centers on a pro surfer who gets kidnapped for a gambling debt.

programme.title: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: A psycho-killer stalks two New York City women--one a frustrated housewife, the other a street-smart hooker who teams up with the first woman's son to trap the murderer. The film reaches a shocking climax when the slayer's real identity is revealed.

programme.title: Redirected
programme.desc: Starring Hollywood hard man Vinnie Jones, "Redirected" follows four friends turned first-time robbers who accidentally get stranded in a middle-of-nowhere Eastern European country.

programme.title: Wicked Ways
programme.desc: A wife, her two-timing husband and a flirting neighbor are unpredictable competitors in a warped game that turns into a life-or-death affair.

programme.title: Cube Zero
programme.desc: A young programmer whose job is to watch over the reality-warping Cube defies orders to rescue an innocent mother trapped in one of its rooms.

programme.title: Space Truckers
programme.desc: A space trucker and his cute fiancee are on their way from a space station to Earth with an unknown cargo. When space pirates hijack them, 5000 disintegrator robots are found in the cargo.

programme.title: Earthling
programme.desc: After a mysterious atmospheric event, a small group of people wake up to realize that their entire lives have been a lie. They are in fact aliens disguised as humans. Now they have to make a choice. Live amongst men, or try to find a way back home.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Mongolia
programme.desc: In Mongolia, former jade hunters have been reduced to a tough life since mines have been shot down.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Peru II
programme.desc: Locals in the Amazon watch the forest disappear thereby forcing them to gather wood in dangerous conditions to make a living.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Siberia
programme.desc: The M56 Highway can be treacherous, icy in winter and dusty in summer. But cold isn't the only enemy. Bears, men and even ghosts are threatening these lorry drivers who always carry guns, vodka and superstitions with them.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Borneo
programme.desc: Borneo, the fourth largest island in the world, has become a symbol of this uneven fight between large corporations that exploit its riches at the expense of its inhabitants, nature and wildlife.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Colombia
programme.desc: Colombia is scattered by dense forests and plane stays the best way to cross the country, but flights aren't often without mishap. Landing strips are too shorts and close to ravines, the weight of the cargo must be controlled regularly.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: China
programme.desc: A lifeline for the numerous villages in the region, the Duong Valley road is the only link between China, Burma, and Tibet. The film crew joins locals (and a very special pig!), aboard a collective taxi to explore the region.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Java Volcano
programme.desc: Dodging landslides in Tajikistan. Crossing bridges that could collapse at any moment in Madagascar. Battling mountain monkeys in Guyana. Journeying on icy, mountainous roads in Ladkh. Every day, children, migrants and workers undertake incredible journeys

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac. City girl Christine moves to Yellowknife to give the unglamorous rampie life a shot.

programme.title: The Monster Maker: The Monster Maker
programme.desc: A mad scientist injects his enemies with an acromegaly virus, causing them to become hideously deformed.

programme.title: Tales From The Crypt
programme.desc: A hooded crypt-keeper (Ralph Richardson) lets five sinners review their pasts before the final abyss.

programme.title: The Human Centipede 2 (Full Sequence)
programme.desc: Inspired by the fictional Dr. Heiter, disturbed loner Martin dreams of creating a 12-person centipede and sets out to realize his sick fantasy.

programme.title: Blacula
programme.desc: The eternally cool William Marshall puts a fresh spin on the age-old legend of the vampire, condemned to wander the Earth with an insatiable lust for blood in "Blacula," often credited as the first African-American horror film.

programme.title: One to Eleven
programme.desc: Several FIFA World Cup™ winners tell the untold stories of how they won in the beautiful game.

programme.title: 1990 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: From Earth to Olympus: Lionel Messi and Diego Maradona World Champions
programme.desc: Enjoy Argentina's triumphs in Mexico 1986™ and Qatar 2022™, with both legends as protagonists.

programme.title: 1990 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Watch the full match replay between Italy and England played at Stadio San Nicola, Bari on Saturday, 7 July 1990 at 20:00 (local time).

programme.title: Insidious
programme.desc: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 2
programme.desc: The Lamberts believe that they have defeated the spirits that have haunted their family, but they soon discover that evil is not beaten so easily.

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 3

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Insubordination

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Fathers & Daughters

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.desc: In 1999, NFL player Rae Carruth is convicted for orchestrating the shooting of his pregnant girlfriend. He is sentenced to 18-24 years. Their son, Chancellor, has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, Ashley Pond and Miranda Gaddis disappear in Portland. Neighbor Ward Weaver, a suspect with a violent history, is later found guilty of their murders and sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 27, 2005, Dennis Rader, known as the BTK killer, pleads guilty to ten murders he committed in Wichita, Kansas, from 1974 to 1994. After a journalist's article reignites the case, Rader is arrested and sentenced to ten life terms without parole.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On December 7, 1993, Colin Ferguson killed six and injured nineteen in the Long Island Railroad Massacre. Defending himself at trial, he bizarrely questioned his own victims and was sentenced to over 300 years in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 28, 2005, Joan Porco attends the trial of her son Christopher, accused of murdering his father and attacking her. Despite her initial identification and later refusal to testify, Christopher is found guilty based on circumstantial evidence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1991, Ray and Faye Copeland, the oldest death row couple in the USA, are convicted of murdering five drifters. Police find the bodies after a tip-off. Faye's death sentence is commuted to life in 1999.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In July 2000, Sarah Payne is abducted and murdered. Roy Whiting, a convicted sex offender, is found guilty and sentenced to life in 2001. Sarah’s case leads to the implementation of “Sarah’s Law” in the UK in 2011.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time
programme.desc: Ton and Allen discover that owning a pawn shop is way more trouble than they expected. With bills stacking up, even an antique ammo collection and some classic football helmets may not be enough to put the guys in the black.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Special Edition/The Secret Life Of Dogs & Babies
programme.desc: The latest book about everyone's favorite boy wizard--Henry Skreever--is finally out! Every kid in town is lining up to get it, except Prunella, who's ordered a limited edition from England. Ever wonder what Baby Kate and Pal are thinking?

programme.title: Arthur: The Lousy Week/You Are Arthur
programme.desc: An army of lice has descended on the heads of Lakewood Elementary. Who or what is strong enough to defeat them? What if you could be Arthur for a day? View Arthur's life through his very own eyes for this special episode.

programme.title: Arthur: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears
programme.desc: The Elwood City Grebes haven't won the Baseball Championship since 1918. But with the addition of three players, the title is finally within reach. Arthur finally saves enough money to buy the bike of his dreams!

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland
programme.desc: Buster receives a box of chocolates in the mail from a secret admirer. It's driving him crazy! Who could possibly like him that much? And James receives a gift from his uncle in Scotland--a toy lamb that will give its owner special powers!

programme.title: Arthur: War of the Worms/I Owe You One
programme.desc: Brain is always taking the fun out of Fern's storytelling by correcting her facts, but things gets out of hand when Fern tricks him with a fake story! Buster is always asking for favors. Will he learn the real meaning of friendship?

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The 1920s and 30s were uncertain times for the RAF as well as all other armed services. With peace came cuts in spending on new aircraft development.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the war the RAF had aircraft that could escort bombers to targets deep inside Germany and back. With the Gloster Meteor, the RAF had also entered the ‘Jet Age’. Aircraft like the Hawker Hunter and F-86 Sabre took the RAF supersonic.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the First World War the RAF had bombers that could fly to Berlin and back. For the first time in a thousand years British civilians found themselves under direct attack - by Zeppelin airships and Gotha bombers.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The RAF’s maritime role is often overlooked. Between the wars the RAF operated elegant flying boats to patrol the far flung corners of the Empire.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: After the war, RAF transports helped keep Berliners alive during the Soviet blockade of the city in 1948/49. As well as flying round-the-clock operations into the airport, Sunderland flying boats delivered supplies by landing on Lake Havel near the city.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: In this programme we bring the RAF story into the modern era. Another aircraft to have extended the RAF’s capabilities is the C130 Hercules. This aircraft has proved its capabilities in countless environments from resupply, to dropping paratroopers.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: This episode tells stories about the secret world of naval deception and cloak and dagger missions. 1914, the yacht Asgard, manned by Erskine Childers, smuggled rifles into a fishing village to arm an Irish militia in their struggle for Home Rule.

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise And Fall of The Nazis: Hidden in Plain Sight 1935-1938

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Cambodian Civil War

programme.desc: 1942 and Hitler has the totally barking idea of using educated dogs to do a soldier's job. The Nazi leader wants to create fearsome canines to help him win the Second World War

programme.desc: The Neutrinos - Dask, Kala and Zak - are back on Earth in search of Kala's pet Grybyx, a small and cuddly creature that, "mega bizzarro," can turn into a humongous monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mister Ogg Goes to Town
programme.desc: When Krang realizes the Technodrome is running low on liquid nitrogen, its main source of fuel, he discovers that a formula exists in Dimension Z which transmutes crude oil, easily available on Earth, into liquid nitrogen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredderville
programme.desc: Because of all the destruction Shredder causes just trying to get rid of the Turtles, they lament that the world would be a better place had they never existed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bye - Bye Fly!
programme.desc: Plotting revenge, Baxter, who has been turned into a fly-like creature, delivers a borellium crystal to Krang and Shredder whose Technodrome is low in power.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Ripoff
programme.desc: The Technodrome is perilously close to running out of power as it teeters on the edge of a crumbling lava cliff deep within the bowels of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Break-In
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder get the Technodrome rolling again and raise it to the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Blow-Out
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder raise the Technodrome to the surface and seize unlimited energy. The Turtles and the World face their darkest hour.

programme.desc: The Turtles launch the missile from the sewers positioned under the Technodrome. It transports Bebop, Rocksteady, Krang and Shredder back to Dimension X but explodes on impact; they survive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles of the Jungle
programme.desc: Donatello's idol, inventor mad-scientist Professor Willard creates the Molecular Intensifier, a machine to control growth of living things.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Toys Around
programme.desc: Michelangelo dreams he's being attacked by Tyranno-toys. He wakes up to hear April announcing the Toy Fair opening. Determined to go, Michelangelo disguises himself as a Turtle toy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Peking Turtles

programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: True Colors/Recycled Koopa
programme.desc: King Koopa drops paint on the Mushroom people, turning some red and others blue./The Koopa kids clean up the castle and dump all their junk into a warp pipe.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mind Your Mummy Mommy, Mario/The Beauty Of Kootie
programme.desc: Hip and Hop steal the golden mummy case of Prince Mushroom-khamen, a dead ringer for Mario. King Koopa is siphoning off all the oil from Desertland to power his doomship!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula
programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Toadally Magical Adventure/Misadventures In Babysitting
programme.desc: Toad is toadally infatuated with the Wizard King's new magic wand. / The Mario Brothers are warped into a Brooklyn apartment and are appointed as babysitters.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Rolling Down The River
programme.desc: The Marios and Toad are trying to save Princess from Koopa's riverboat. When their plan goes horribly wrong, Toad gets caught and the Marios barely escape with their lives.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Sneaking Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopas/Reptiles In The Rose Garden
programme.desc: King Koopa uses a Magic Wand to turn Cheatsy, Bigmouth, Bully, and Kooky into giants./Kootie Pie demands that she be given Real World America as a gift.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars Lindstrom is an akwardly shy young man in a small town who finally brings home the girl of his dreams to his brother and sister-in-law's home. The only problem is that she's not real - she's a sex doll.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A rookie cop is assigned to the 118 Precinct in the same district where he grew up. The Precinct Captain starts receiving letters about two unsolved murders that happened many years ago in the housing projects when the rookie cop was just a kid.

programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, Terminal follows the twisting tales of two assassins carrying out a sinister mission (Max Irons & Dexter Fletcher), a teacher battling a fatal illness (Simon Pegg), an enigmatic janitor (Mike Myers)...

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata Poker Open
programme.desc: A massive field of 1,042 entries turned up for the WPT Borgata Poker Open, and just six players remain in contention for the $734,000 top prize.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Festa al Lago
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour returns to Bellagio for the WPT Festa al Lago, and Andy Frankenberger aims to win two titles in the same season.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic
programme.desc: Vanessa Rousso looks to win her first WPT title, but Antonio Esfandiari and Andrew Robl stand in her way in the WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic.

programme.title: Auntie Lee's Meat Pies
programme.desc: A devil-worshiping woman sends out her four beautiful nieces to lure men back to her place so they can be killed, ground up and sold as meat pies.

programme.title: The Bikini Carwash Company 2
programme.desc: The girls from The Bikini Carwash Company, (1992) are back. Their carwash company is a success, but to prevent it from being consumed by a mega company, the ladies partner up with a TV lingerie business.

programme.title: Confessions of A Sex Maniac
programme.desc: A sex-crazed young architect decides that he wants to design a building shaped like the perfect breast, so he searches all over London for a woman who bears the perfect model.

programme.title: Escape Plan: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone, Arnold Schwarzenegger, and 50 Cent star as inmates who must break out of a top secret, high-security prison in this non-stop action-thriller.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: War (2007)
programme.desc: A full-throttle, martial arts thriller, WAR stars Jet Li and Jason Statham as two adversaries set on a violent collision course in the Asian mob underground.

programme.title: Wicked Ways
programme.desc: A wife, her two-timing husband and a flirting neighbor are unpredictable competitors in a warped game that turns into a life-or-death affair.

programme.title: No Way Home
programme.desc: A paroled murderer returns to the Staten Island home of his youth, where a poignant friendship blossoms with the restrained wife of his temperamental-- and jealous-- brother.

programme.title: Secrets of an Undercover Wife
programme.desc: Starring Shawnee Smith and Michael Woods. A newlywed goes undercover to investigate after her husband is unexpectedly arrested and convicted of murder and embezzlement.

programme.title: Earthling
programme.desc: After a mysterious atmospheric event, a small group of people wake up to realize that their entire lives have been a lie. They are in fact aliens disguised as humans. Now they have to make a choice. Live amongst men, or try to find a way back home.

programme.title: Life Like
programme.desc: An idealistic, attractive young couple acquires a stunning, life-like robot for guilt-free help; but, as the three grow closer, their perception of humanity will be altered forever.

programme.title: Merlin: The Return
programme.desc: The evil sorcerer Mordred and his dark forces are pitted against the mythical sorcery of Merlin. Under Merlin's spell, Mordred and his mother have been imprisoned for 1500 years, but a meddlesome scientist from the present creates a gateway to escape.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac. City girl Christine moves to Yellowknife to give the unglamorous rampie life a shot.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north. But a series of problems with the Electra leave the company in a jam.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake. The ice strip landing goes fine, but when the plane takes off from the strip, the right landing gear gets stuck in the wheel well.

programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.desc: As a full moon hangs over the city, the rookies are unnerved by a series of strange occurrences. While investigating the theft of three severed heads, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a mentally unstable man who has stopped taking his medication

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a college student (Josh Brolin) experimenting with time travel takes a job with a prestigious lab, he doesn't realize that the lab's billionaire owner understands completely the financial and political benefits of seeing into the future.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When Father Anton, a priest who has been questioning his faith, stumbles and hits his head, he suddenly begins to see demons all about him. When those demons bestow upon him the power over life and death, he uses it…but nothing comes without a cost.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When Sharon Rosman's son is abducted his 6-year-old sister is the only witness but is far too traumatized to speak. When psychologist John Holland comes to work with the young girl, she tells him it was the boogeyman…from under the bed.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Dropped out of space by a chunk of dark matter, pilot Paul Stein (John Heard) discovers a derelict ship lost ten years ago with all hands, including his long-lost brother. Only it seems that the crew may not quite be dead…or alive.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Border

programme.title: Monkey

programme.desc: The King of Unicorns seeks Monkey’s magic staff as a gift. Using a magic ring, he captures Tripitaka and weakens Monkey. Pigsy, tempted by Chun-Shou, must resist to save his master.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The Grey Gloves Devil kills villages with hypnotic eyes. While Pigsy lags, a woman mistakes Tripitaka for her lost son. Captured, Pigsy must escape before the Devil strikes again.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A village is ravaged by locusts led by Demon Queen Grasshopper, chasing the magic Lake Lok-Nor. Can the pilgrims stop her swarms, or will she turn them all into pigs?

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The proprietor (Pat Hingle) of a halfway house for reformed criminals steals from rich gangsters and gives the money to his charges.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The prime suspects in the grenade death of a Vietnam veteran are the members of the man's former squadron; guest Scott Hylands.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.desc: When a young boy refuses to comply with her commands and Cagney (Sharon Gless) is forced to shoot him, her life becomes a nightmare. Cagney must deal with having shot a young boy, while the press claims it to be racially motivated.

programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) spend the weekend on duty going through old paperwork when they discover a warrant for a rape case that expires in 24 hours. The two must race to serve the warrant before it expires.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Hooked
programme.desc: During a drug raid, Cagney and Lacey arrest the man responsible for Dory McKenna's (guest star Barry Primus) drug rehabilitation on charges of narcotics possession. When the evidence disappears, Dory becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Lady Luck
programme.desc: Lacey stops a woman's attempted suicide but feels guilt and responsibility when the woman turns up murdered soon after. When Cagney and Lacey investigate the murder, they soon discover a world of massive gambling debts and loan sharks.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1975, 15-year-old Martha Moxley is murdered in Belle Haven, Connecticut. The case goes cold until 2002, when Michael Skakel, a family member, is convicted based on new evidence. Skakel maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In a gruesome 1989 case, Tracey Wigginton and her accomplices lure Edward Baldock with promises of a good time, only to brutally stab him to death, sparking a sensational trial that raised questions about the roles of her accomplices.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1983, Graeme Cunningham vanishes in Salt Lake City. Detective Don Bell discovers Arthur Bishop, who confesses to killing Graeme and four other boys. Bishop is found guilty in 1984 and executed in 1988.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In September 1987, Simon Dale is murdered. His ex-wife, Susan Wilberforce, is acquitted of the crime but later convicted of fraud and sentenced to seven years. The murder remains unsolved.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2007, Meredith Kercher is murdered in Italy. Amanda Knox and Raffaele Sollecito are initially convicted but later exonerated. Rudy Guede is convicted. The Kercher family still seeks justice.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, fashion journalist Christa Worthington is found murdered in her Truro home. Christopher McCowen is convicted in 2006 of her murder, robbery, and rape, despite his claims of innocence and other DNA found at the scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Unlikely Sources
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Deadly Smile
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out To Kill
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Abduction

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning continue their antique adventure with Anita in the lead, having won the first auction. Can Paul catch her up as they go from the steel city of Sheffield, heading for auction in Luddendenfoot, West Yorkshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's an auction apiece for Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning as they reach the halfway point of their Antiques Road Trip. This leg sees them begin in South Cave in the East Riding of Yorkshire, aiming for auction in Twickenham, London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning head for round four at auction and they both have their eyes on the prize. Starting out in Navenby, Lincolnshire they make their way towards the penultimate auction in the Norfolk town of Diss.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final leg for road trippers Paul Laidlaw and Anita Manning. There are only a few pounds separating this competitive duo as they begin in Norwich, and head for a nail-biting final auction in Stamford, Licolnshire.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Ann Widdecombe and Craig Revel Horwood, with their experts Mark Stacey and Catherine Southon, travel from Colyton in Devon through Somerset buying antiques and ending up at an auction in Southend-on-sea.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Toya reveals a secret about Mariah; Mariah shows up late to a party.

programme.title: Married to Medicine Houston
programme.desc: An elegant Shabbat dinner at Cindi's turns ugly; Rachel hosts a night out with Ashandra and Elly, who is still reeling from the disparaging remarks Monica made about her; Maribel attracts a suitor after dipping her toes into the online dating pool.

programme.title: Married to Medicine Los Angeles
programme.desc: Imani's rooftop event comes to a boil as Shanique makes outrageous claims about Asha's husband; Jazmin faces off with Imani about her drug dealer comments; Britten goes house hunting; Noelle must decide if she made the right school choice for Gaby.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Loyalties throughout the medical community are questioned after Mariah and Toya's fight at the party.

programme.title: Married to Medicine Houston
programme.desc: During a brunch, Monica is blindsided when Elly finally confronts her; the argument threatens to tear the entire group apart as everyone is forced to take sides; Erika and Derek receive unfortunate news in their quest to conceive.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: The fallout from the big brawl continues when Toya disinvites Mariah's family from her upcoming Spooky Ookey party; Quad has her paws full when she invites both Mariah and Toya to her Puppies in Paris soirée.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan suits up to sell designer Marc Jacobs' swanky West Village townhouse; KJ brings in an interested buyer; Steve whets the appetite with a tasty open house; Tyler is challenged to sell a property across from a police and fire station.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan scores a two-for-one property with a hidden apartment; Steve seals the deal on a historical property in NYC's beloved Ansonia building; KJ is faced with closing the Townhouse in the Sky, but she struggles to make her toughest client happy.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan attempts to woo the hard-to-get developer of his dreams; things heat up at Tyler's fireman open house; KJ breaks down when a threat looms.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: The agents document their lives in lockdown, they learn how to navigate a new world; a fleeing New Yorker tasks Tyler with selling her flamboyantly Floridian apartment; Ryan brings on a team member; Fredrik encounters some glitches.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: As New Yorkers return to the city, Ryan reveals major news; Steve unveils his impressive renovation at the iconic Ansonia; stuck in LA, Fred experiments with a robot-driven private showing; Tyler navigates a Southern Belle with seller's remorse.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Cruel Skies revisits four pivotal aviation disasters and near-misses that have taught the industry on how to get planes in the air safely.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A loud ‘thud’ emanates from the fuselage of British Airtours Flight #28, and the pilots abandon takeoff. Thick black smoke fills the cabin, and minutes later the aircraft is completely ravaged by fire

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Roaring down the runway at 170 miles an hour, Northwest Airlines Flight #255 barely manages to get off the ground before it hits a light pole, slams into a building, and disintegrates on a highway.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: After getting into position for a low-altitude fly-by at the Alsace air show, Airbus A-320 plows into a forest and is consumed by flames.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: US Air Flight #1493 get clearance just moments before landing, but within seconds of touching down, the aircraft erupts in flames and crashes into an abandoned brick building.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple are all at sea as they attempt to run a new fishing charter. How will two bed & breakfasters in France cope with their biggest challenge yet? And on the Costa Blanca, a family pulls together to try and rescue their Spanish dream but will it work?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Owners of a vineyard open a pop up restaurant in a stunning location, but there are some last minute nerves. Two bed & breakfasters host an unusual event in a bid to boost takings. And in Spain, a wannabe fishing captain has to learn the ropes.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: It’s decision time for a couple hoping to run a fishing charter business. How will two bed & breakfasters cope with some tricky customers? And with their first ever guests now booked in, will an observatory business in rural France please it’s punters?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Two estate agents attempt to turn their passion for wine into profit by running a vineyard in France. Can a young couple open their guest house in time? And we follow the launch of a new paragliding business off the mountains of Costa Blanca.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple need to diversity their French gite business, there’s a rocky start for a paragliding company in Spain, and can two novice wine makers take on the French at a local wine fair?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple branch out, offering package holidays at their beautiful French gite, two novice winemakers finally move house, and will a new fishing business impress its latest guests?

programme.title: MetaJets

programme.title: Street Sharks

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Runaway
programme.desc: Understanding that the minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, the kids sneak the new team out of the base. Thrust finds them, but so do the Autobots who save the day. It's agreed the minicons should not be forced to fight.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Bloody Marty / Ghost In The Mower
programme.desc: The kids ignore Rosebuds warning and summon Bloody Marty from the ominous mirror world.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: First Encounter
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Cons, mini-transformers who can be used as upgrades by their bigger brethren, crash lands on Earth. In present day, a group of children finds their ship by accident which brings the war to Earth.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Their previous trip to Bograth having been interrupted, the kids return to the swamp realm to search for its Dreamstone. They encounter a herder named Gorran dipping a large cage containing Bograthian Creatures into an oozing black puddle.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Dreamers' good deeds lead to renewed friendship with the people of Arderial. But when they approach the Guardian Hyren of the realm, it senses the presence of the Core Hyren, and the two powerful creatures resume an ancient argument.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Peking Turtles
programme.desc: April O'Neil reports from the Uptown Museum about a display of artifacts from the 2000-year-old Ying Dynasty of China. The marble warriors were built to protect the world's largest pearl from being stolen from the Emperor's collection of jewels.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's Mother
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Four Turtles and A Baby

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Got Served
programme.desc: After a crushing defeat, the guys leave an auction empty handed and scramble to find new merchandise at a yard sale. But questionable antique tennis rackets and an ancient special effects box may not earn them a cent.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a woman discovers the bludgeoned body of her nephew, investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise. With three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A crazed cab driver goes on a seven-hour shooting spree, killing six people and critically injuring two.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After getting a call that a wife and mother had been missing for 10 years, sheriffs launch an investigation that uncovers a web of lies that leads them to the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a missing woman is discovered by a deputy to be murdered in the backyard of her family home, investigators must learn whether the victim was killed by a mysterious driver seen lingering outside the house, or someone unexpected.

programme.desc: Dog and Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bustin' with Justin

programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rainy Day Woman
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Ticket to Ride
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Knows Best

programme.title: Dynasty: The Rescue

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Bianca & Brogan

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Shroud of Turin
programme.desc: Is this famous piece of linen cloth the actual burial cloth of Jesus Christ or a clever Medieval hoax?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Freemasons
programme.desc: Are the Freemasons a harmless fraternity whose members busy themselves by raising money for children's hospitals or a satanic cult whose tentacles and enslave mankind?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret? The mysterious military base located 30 minutes north west of Las Vegas has been rumored to be involved in back engineering advanced alien technology recovered from UFO crash sites.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard travels to England to investigate Britain's Roswell, also known as the Woodbridge-Bentwaters UFO incident, considered by many to be one of the best documented UFO cases on record

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Mokele Mbembe
programme.desc: Mokele Mbembe means able to stem the flow of rivers. The Pygmies there say they have encountered just such a creature and according to their descriptions, this behemoth is a dead ringer for an Apotosaurus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Murder of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In a gruesome 1989 case, Tracey Wigginton and her accomplices lure Edward Baldock with promises of a good time, only to brutally stab him to death, sparking a sensational trial that raised questions about the roles of her accomplices.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and The Real Mr. Ratburn/Arthur's Spelling Trubble
programme.desc: It's the first day of third grade and Arthur's biggest fear has come true--his new teacher is the dreaded Mr. Ratburn. Then, it’s time for the all-school spellathon. Arthur is chosen to compete, and he finds facing Prunella and The Brain!

programme.title: Arthur: Night of the Tibble/Read and Flumberghast
programme.desc: The Tibble Twins are having their first sleepover! Will the Tibbles lock James in the dark basement? Then, a cupcake's been stolen! The primary suspect: Tommy Tibble. D.W. gathers a jury and demands that justice be served.

programme.title: Arthur: Room to Ride/The Frensky Family Fiasco
programme.desc: With Lance Armstrong’s support, Binky and his friends take to the streets to convince residents to vote for new bike safety lanes. Francine wants the Frenskys to be closer, but a weekly Family Night turns out to be harder than expected.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes To Camp/Buster Makes The Grade
programme.desc: Arthur and his friends go to summer camp where it's strictly boys vs. girls. Next, Buster Baxter is everyone's favorite jokester. Unfortunately, though, Buster's grades aren't as good as his jokes, and Buster may have to repeat third grade.

programme.title: Arthur: The Great MacGrady, Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: When Mrs. MacGrady is diagnosed with cancer, Arthur and his friends all react differently to the news. The kids must learn how to come together to help support each other and Mrs. MacGrady.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Treasure Hunt/The Return Of The King
programme.desc: When Buster digs up an ancient arrowhead, everyone else wants to hunt for buried treasures, too. And a field trip to the Medieval Fair pits Arthur's class against another led by Ratburn's super-tough mentor, Mr. Pryce-Jones.

programme.title: Arthur: What Scared Sue Ellen?/Clarissa Is Cracked
programme.desc: Sue Ellen's not afraid of much, but when she encounters a really creepy howling noise in the woods, she's scared for real. Then, Grandma Thora has a lot of fun stuff, especially her porcelain doll, Clarissa.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur And The Big Riddle/Double Dare
programme.desc: Alex Trebek lends his voice as gameshow host Alex Lebek in this episode which poses the age-old riddle--is winning really everything? What if your friends dared you to skip homework--and then double dared you to skip school?

programme.title: Arthur: Get Smart/Baby Steps
programme.desc: Everyone loves HUGO--the new interactive whiteboard that claims to be 100% accurate. If only Mr. Ratburn knew how to use it. Mei Lin can say "hello" AND play the piano?!? Kate can't even wave!

programme.title: Voices of D-Day Landings
programme.desc: In the early hours of June 6th, 1944 Allied forces began the greatest military assault ever attempted. They came to Normandy by both air and sea with one objective.

programme.title: 1917 - The Real Story
programme.desc: Documentary of the True Story behind the International Blockbuster Film \\"1917\\" . Insight into the story behind the film. The real-life characters and what became of them.

programme.title: All Quiet On The Western Front - The True story
programme.desc: Discover the riveting true events of World War II that inspired the gripping Netflix TV series. Delve into the historical backdrop and real-life experiences that shaped the narrative, offering a fascinating glimpse into the origins of this acclaimed show.

programme.title: Battle of Britain - Empty Skies
programme.desc: Tells the story of 19 men and women who were there. Through a series of filmed interviews their stories have been preserved, allowing them to tell the part they played in the nation's defence in their own words creating a unique collection of accounts.

programme.title: Blitz the Aftermath
programme.desc: With interviews and archive footage showing the sheer amount of devastation – from the loss of life to the immense damage caused to buildings across the country - The Aftermath looks at how the Blitz changed the face of Britain's cities and lives.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: HE-111: Germany’s Frontline Bomber
programme.desc: The Heinkel He 111 is one of the most recognised German aircraft of WW2. The broad winged design was a guinea pig for future bombers, with more variants than any other military aircraft of the time.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Bomb: Episode 2
programme.desc: Did Nazi uranium make it to Japan in the final months of WW2? Were the Axis powers closer to a bomb than we think? Drama unfolds as experts shed new light on the hardships, challenges and secrets of a war-torn, pre-nuclear world.

programme.title: Guns That Changed The Game: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: Rise of the Machines: While the single shot rifle remained a mainstay until WWI, machine guns had been in development since the final days of the American Civil War.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: The Wrens
programme.desc: When Gilbert Roberts arrives to set up a tactical school for the U-boats, he receives a frosty reception from Admiral Noble. Enlisting the help of Jean Laidlaw and a small team of Wrens, Roberts begins unpicking the flaws in Walker’s ‘Buttercup’.

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: In the early hours of 8th July 1944, a normally quiet part of rural Northamptonshire was a hive of activity as the 17 twinned engine Wellington bombers rumbled down the runway of their Turweston airfield home.

programme.title: Africa's Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: Follow the incredible journey of a Hawksbill turtle between two distinct worlds.

programme.desc: The Hotel Inspector travels to various struggling hotels to give them advice and suggestions on how to improve their business.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Ann Widdecombe and Craig Revel Horwood, with their experts Mark Stacey and Catherine Southon, travel from Colyton in Devon through Somerset buying antiques and ending up at an auction in Southend-on-sea.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two of the Dragons, Deborah Meaden and Theo Paphitis, go head-to-head with the help of Mark Stacey and Thomas Plant, scouring the West Country for antiques starting in Honiton Devon and ending up at an auction in Crewkerne, Somerset.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalists Kirsty Wark and Alastair Stewart battle it out with aid from Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon. From Edinburgh to Falkland to St. Andrews, they head way south to Kent for auction.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tony Blackburn--60's DJ icon--and Toyah Willcox--an 80's pop phenomenon--take to the road with Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson. Their journey starts in the historic town of York and ends up with an auction in Stanstead, Essex.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor Tom Conti and presenter Katie Derham fight it out with James Braxton and James Lewis to turn £400 into profit. Their journey takes them around East Sussex starting in Lewes and ending with an auction in Wandsworth.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: The fallout from the big brawl continues when Toya disinvites Mariah's family from her upcoming Spooky Ookey party; Quad has her paws full when she invites both Mariah and Toya to her Puppies in Paris soirée.

programme.title: Married to Medicine Los Angeles
programme.desc: The women come back to earth after their psychic reading goes off book, leading them to suspect Noelle of masterminding it; Imani sees her half-sister for the first time ever; Britten hosts a pool party; Shanique and Robert fight over her work.

programme.title: Married to Medicine Houston
programme.desc: Imad returns to town after receiving an ultimatum from Monica; Erika transforms a patient's life; Monica and Elly attempt to repair their relationship; Cindi Rose is left speechless when Ashandra skips her Kentucky Derby hat party.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Jackie organizes a group intervention for Mariah and Toya.

programme.title: Married to Medicine Los Angeles
programme.desc: Britten has to make a difficult decision that has repercussions for everyone; Robert throws a surprise dinner for Shanique; Asha updates Noelle on her potential pregnancy; Imani reunites with her long-lost sister; Imani throws a rooftop event.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: As New Yorkers return to the city, Ryan reveals major news; Steve unveils his impressive renovation at the iconic Ansonia; stuck in LA, Fred experiments with a robot-driven private showing; Tyler navigates a Southern Belle with seller's remorse.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Tyler heads to Harlem to sell a huge family home; Kemba and Tyler throw a psychic-themed Open House; Ryan sets up tours which feature a Lamborghini; Steve invites New York City socialite Dorinda Medley to help spread the word about Wiltsie.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: As real estate outside Manhattan continues to explode, KJ returns to her hometown of Rye, N.Y., for a coveted listing and secures the help of her interior designer mom to bring in potential buyers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik is assigned a live-in sale situation for a $15 million luxury penthouse; inspired by his friend in the Berkshires, Dorinda Medley, Steve stages a splashy open house at his upstate farm and invites an unimpressed KJ to take a walk in the mud.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Team Serhant hosts private showings with an Australian buyer who has never visited New York but is willing to purchase property over FaceTime if Ryan can meet his demands; the virtual showings take them across the city to one of KJ's listings.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: US Air Flight #1493 get clearance just moments before landing, but within seconds of touching down, the aircraft erupts in flames and crashes into an abandoned brick building.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Hoping to save fuel, Korean Airlines Flight #007 requests permission to fly at a higher altitude. When the plane reaches its new altitude, it is rocked by rapid decompression, and crashes into the sea

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Air Ontario Flight #1363 prepares for takeoff after a brief layover. It reaches takeoff speed but struggles to get airborne, starts shaking violently, and crashes into the woods.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Air Inter Flight #148 starts its descent. Slightly off course, a controller guides the pilots, but as they descend the aircraft rips through the treetops below and slams into the side of a mountain.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Just as Chalk’s Ocean Airways Flight #101 is leveling off, it is suddenly rocked by an explosion and, plunges into the ocean. Eyewitness reports confirm one of its wings ripped off in mid-air.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Making a routine one-hour journey from Berlin, Crossair Flight #3597 is on its final approach to Zurich. But just minutes before landing the pilots cannot find the runway.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple branch out, offering package holidays at their beautiful French gite, two novice winemakers finally move house, and will a new fishing business impress its latest guests?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: The last-minute dash to open a tapas bar with a difference in Spain, and a celebrity guest checks in to a French fishing holiday lodge. A couple opening a bed & breakfast for runners, and the new winemakers in France begin work on their new gites.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: As the summer comes to an end, its harvest day for the new winemakers in France. A disease threatens the future of a fishing business, and will a revamp save Spain’s newest tapas bar?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A family opens a cycling tour company in Southern France. An English diving instructor in Marbella buys out his only competitor, and after a lifetime spent locking up criminals, two former policemen buy a bed & breakfast in Southern Spain.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A mix up at the pumps leaves a diving instructor stranded in Marbella, and two London policemen crash their van on the way to Spain. With eight days to spare a family races to finish renovations on their bed & breakfast.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: There are building problems at an English-run bed & breakfast. A diving instructor in Marbella faces an uncertain future, and after being refused a mortgage in London, a young couple tries their luck in southern Spain.

programme.title: Storm Hawks

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: The dinos each receive separate phone calls inviting them to receive a prestigious award: Dino Of The Year! This sets off a series of arguments, with each dino declaring that they must be the winner.

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Every year dozens of Sky Knights go head to head in a treacherous bike race across Terra Saharr, competing to win a rare and powerful Velocity amulet.

programme.desc: During an unfair polo match, McGee falls down an armadillo and wakes up in 'Bottomland.'

programme.desc: When Polly peers into an ancient chest in the museum’s storage room, an other-worldy glow envelopes her, and Polly finds herself with a strange and horrible affliction… she becomes a WERE-DINO! A hideous half-human, half-dino creature!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Squares, Squares Everywhere
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When several sports balls suddenly disappear without a trace, it’s detective BJ to the rescue as he dons trenchcoat and fedora.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Son of Return of the Fly II
programme.desc: After escaping from dimensional limbo, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) and his computer companion Z employ an experimental solid-energy generator to take over Channel Six.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Knocks 'Em Dead!
programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: The Exes
