programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: After an argument, the twins decide to split the house in half; Best tries to grow a plant in an attempt to win a gardening competition.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Bester decides to take a cockroach as a pet and Best feels sidelined as a result. To win a game of Triviant, Best and Bester must prove that the Waffle Fish really exists.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Bester decides to participate in an art competition by presenting a painting by Best. While Best and Bester are playing, their balloon ends up in a particularly grumpy neighbour's garden.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Best steals Bester's thunder and endangers his record attempt. While searching for the first woodpecker in spring, Best learns how 'in-tune' with nature he is after all.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester turn themselves into chess pieces but have to abandon their game to save the sub from flooding. Plus, Bester and Best are tasked with neutralising the enemy agent's ransomware for the Bettervale Investigation Bureau.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: In order to discover why the laundry is disappearing from the laundry room, Best and Bester conduct an undercover investigation. Best is mistaken for a notorious jewel thief.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: When Diamond refuses to give the twins a lift in his spaceship, they embark on their own space exploration. Best gets himself into a series of awkward situations.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The remaining contestants take on a bank heist challenge. They must break team-mates Owen and LeShawna out of a bank vault, then build a getaway go-kart from junk.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: After her lawsuit, Courtney is back, and playing by her own rules. Today's genre is the period drama - and the period in question is the Stone Age.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The contestants have football training before this week's challenge, which has a sports theme. The sports involved are boxing, badminton, wrestling and basketball.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: May competes against a former rock’n’roll guitarist and band leader in the Silver Town Pokémon Contest for her second Kanto ribbon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: At the Battle Dome, Ash challenges Frontier Brain Tucker, a master of both battle tactics and showbiz savvy, for his third Frontier Symbol.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: On their way to the Battle Pike, Ash and friends meet a supercharged Elekid who’s on a rampage, attacking everything in sight—including Max!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: The Mythical Pokémon Celebi has been injured in the forest, and Ash and friends, along with a Pokémon Ranger, nurse Celebi back to health.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: At the Battle Pike, Ash must further hone his on-the-spot strategy skills to defeat a soft-spoken, fierce Frontier Brain named Queen Lucy and win his fourth Frontier Symbol.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: After arriving on Potpourri Island, our heroes discover the Pokémon Orienteering competition just about to take place and decide to enter, vying for the coveted Pokémon Teamwork medal!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: In the Wisteria Town Pokémon Contest, May discovers she is to compete against her old rival Harley.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: As our heroes continue toward May’s next Pokémon Contest, Ash’s Grovyle finds itself nursing a crush on Nurse Joy’s Meganium!

programme.desc: Hip and Hop steal the golden mummy case of Prince Mushroom-khamen, a dead ringer for Mario. King Koopa is siphoning off all the oil from Desertland to power his doomship!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario's Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Mario and Co are traveling through a desert, dying of thirst. Thanks to a boobytrap, they wind up in the palace of Sultan Pasbah, who tries to force Princess into his harem, while the guys are sent to the dungeon.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Brooklyn Bound
programme.desc: In the Snow World, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, exhausted and hungry, weakly venture forth through a snowy field, mentioning that the hoards of Koopa Khan are after them.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Count Koopula
programme.desc: In a dark forest, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are running frantically through pouring rain, in a mysterious place called Turtlevania.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Toadally Magical Adventure/Misadventures In Babysitting
programme.desc: Toad is toadally infatuated with the Wizard King's new magic wand. / The Mario Brothers are warped into a Brooklyn apartment and are appointed as babysitters.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: At a turning point in his life, a former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Legends of Poker
programme.desc: Six players compete for more than $750,000 at the WPT L.A. Poker Classic final table at Commerce Casino.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Legends of Poker
programme.desc: Five players compete for more than $750,000 at the WPT L.A. Poker Classic final table at Commerce Casino.

programme.title: Catfish
programme.desc: In 2007, Ariel and Henry sensed a story as they began to film the life of Ariel's brother, Nev. They had no idea that their project would lead to the most exhilarating months of their lives.

programme.title: The Cartier Affair
programme.desc: Curt Taylor is severely indebted to the top dog at California State Prison. After being released from jail, Curt takes a job as Cartier Rand's secretary to steal her jewels and settle his debt. Starring: Joan Collins, David Hasselhoff, Ed Lauter

programme.title: Marilyn Monroe: Fascination
programme.desc: Marilyn Monroe endured criticism, insecurity, drug dependence, miscarriages and broken marriages, yet she managed to parlay her beauty, talent and quick wit into a career.

programme.title: The Bikini Carwash Company 2
programme.desc: The girls from The Bikini Carwash Company, (1992) are back. Their carwash company is a success, but to prevent it from being consumed by a mega company, the ladies partner up with a TV lingerie business.

programme.title: Evel Knievel
programme.desc: Biography of the famed motorcycle daredevil, much of which was filmed in his home town of Butte, Montana. The film depicts Knievel reflecting on major events in his life just before a big jump.

programme.title: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: The criminal exploits of Public Enemy number 1, George 'Machine-Gun' Kelly, during the 1930s.

programme.title: Paths Of Glory
programme.desc: This powerful, fact-based absurdity-of-war film stars Kirk Douglas as a commanding officer who defends three scapegoats on trial for a failed offensive that occurred within the French Army in 1916.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: The tale of Conan the Cimmerian and his adventures across the continent of Hyboria on a quest to avenge the murder of his father and the slaughter of his village.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Lisa's return to her hometown to join the local police force coincides with the release of a man, Jake, who killed her best friend 15 years earlier. Soon, people start dying mysterious deaths and the investigation points to Jake as prime suspect.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Hacker
programme.desc: As a teenage girl, Laura witnessed the arrest of her father, a brilliant hacker. As an adult, Laura has become a hacker to assist in national security.

programme.title: Target Earth
programme.desc: When aliens have infiltrated society by inhabiting bodies of select human beings, they plan a full-scale invasion of Earth. A detective finds the information that can stop the attack; however the information is in the mind of a six-year-old child.

programme.title: Fantastic Planet
programme.desc: On a faraway planet where blue giants rule, oppressed humanoids rebel against their machine-like leaders.

programme.title: Magical Adventures in the Forbidden City
programme.desc: In another world Abigail lives in a city whose borders were closed years ago because of a disease. She takes us on a magical adventure, rising against the forces in command and shows how being brave and following your heart can show anything is possible.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A Perth heavy haulage crew moves a huge pedestrian bridge.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve battles flooded highways when his truck breaks down, leaving him stranded.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A leaky fridge halts Woody's urgent frozen food delivery.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A delicate rescue operation to recover a 70-year-old World War II bomber.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Kelly must transport 40 tonnes of grapes to a winery before they start fermenting.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Bolivia
programme.desc: Dodging landslides in Tajikistan. Crossing bridges that could collapse at any moment in Madagascar. Battling mountain monkeys in Guyana. Journeying on icy, mountainous roads in Ladkh. Every day, children, migrants and workers undertake incredible journeys

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Headless Hat

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Second Mona Lisa

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death In Inner Space
programme.desc: A scientist seeks a way to suspend bodily life functions during space travel, and his test subject dies from lack of oxygen. Accident or foul play?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Talking Head
programme.desc: A 12 year old boy insists his dead father told him to kill his mother's new fiancée. But did the father truly die in an accidental plane crash?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Devil Sells His Soul
programme.desc: Colonel March hypnotizes five people to solve the stabbing murder of Lord Telford, while he himself portrays the murder victim.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Murder Is Permanent
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a murder in a beauty salon; there are plenty of suspects and it's up to him to single out the murderer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Silent Vow
programme.desc: A customer dies from poisoned wine dining at a café, and the waiter falls under suspicion because he was a former chemist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death and the Other Monkey
programme.desc: A cancer research scientist believes his test monkey was not only stolen, but also replaced. He is later found dead from gas; suicide or not?

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: While protecting an exposed heiress, Cat and Vincent hunt a black market buyer targeting beasts. They realise how much is at stake if Vincent’s identity is revealed. Nina Lisandrello, Austin Basis, and Nicole Gale Anderson also star.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: While tracking a threat to Vincent, Cat suspects she might be pregnant. Vincent’s lead puts him in danger, and JT is kidnapped by mistake. Nina Lisandrello and Nicole Gale Anderson also star.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast

programme.desc: After Kim and Stevie move into their own apartment their mothers have a tough time cutting the apron strings.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: UNFORGIVEN
programme.desc: Nineteen years ago, Kim’s birth divided Nikki and her father; now, only Kim can mend their family feud.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: It’s A Spring Bling Thing
programme.desc: While Kim, T and Stevie rock Palm Springs, Nikki goes on the 'Road Trip from Hell' with Professor Oglevee

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Get Me To The Church On Time
programme.desc: Kim is getting married...over Nikki’s dead body.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Since I Lost My Baby
programme.desc: Nikki and Veronica team up to break up Professor Oglevee’s new romance.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Wedding Bell Blues (Part 2 To #021)
programme.desc: Professor Oglevee and Nikki try to stop Kim from eloping.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dead Legends
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey investigate the famed Hotel Conneaut in northern Pennsylvania. Heavy doors opening on their own, sightings of a boy, a bride and a menacing butcher have the hotel's staff on edge.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Carr House
programme.desc: Part of a once splendorous manor and a history that goes back as far as Robin Hood, Carr House is the sight of many a paranormal occurrence.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT1
programme.desc: What was once a private home before becoming a sanctuary for the elderly, the abandoned Hill House is now an eerie shadow of its former glory, that houses empty rooms, strange noises and a plethora of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT2
programme.desc: Part one saw the team seemingly getting stalked by something, and in this part it shows its hand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Village Church Farm
programme.desc: A museum like no other, this small collection of antiquated buildings is said to be the home of several spirits. The team get more than they bargained for as objects move; strange noises are caught on camera and the best EVP response to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Old Nick Theatre
programme.desc: Once a prison and a police station and now a theatre the Old Nick is famous for its unexplained occurrences. Fred decides to summon up some extra help while objects move and something wants to make itself known.

programme.desc: With their beloved bread truck on life support, Ton and Allen head to an auction to help save her. Will an industrial grinder and a classic Chevy be enough to mend Betsy, or will the guys be forced to say goodbye for good?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Big Crush

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PEOPLE WITHOUT IDENTITY
programme.desc: 10 Mysterious Figures: Individuals who emerged from obscurity, made their mark on history, then vanished without a trace. Their identities remain unconfirmed, shrouding them in mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: NATURE’S MAGIC
programme.desc: Natural sites worldwide hold spiritual significance for civilizations, from ancient rituals to modern reverence, each crackling with unique energy and a hint of magic.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS AND UNSOLVED DISSAPEARANCES
programme.desc: Legally declared dead, bodies never found. Disappearances spark speculation, media attention, and unanswered questions. Where did they go?

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: THE MYSTERY AND CULTS OF MUMMIES
programme.desc: Unlock the mystery of mummification from ancient Egypt to present. Explore its fascination and quest for Queen Nefertiti's mummy. Where did 70 million ancient mummies disappear? Delve into Latin American mummy legends.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF ANCIENT CULTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries associated with ancient cultures including Lemuria, the Indus Valley civilization of Harappa, the Forgotten Kingdoms of Tibet, the Olmec civilization of Central America.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SACRED BUILDINGS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the sacred places and buildings of ancient and medieval people including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral, Derinkuyu Underground City, Santiago de Compostela Catherdral.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNSOLVED MYSTERIES IN PHYSICS
programme.desc: In the late 19th century, scientists thought all major physics laws were discovered. Now, we realize vast unknowns remain. Despite our understanding, mysteries persist in the physical world.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Martian Attractions
programme.desc: The Latest in Martian exploration from orbit and on the ground, new sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on to the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Proving Einstein
programme.desc: Some of the proof of Einstein’s theories had long been elusive, beyond the capabilities of technology, until now.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: The International Space Station is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of low Earth orbit; observation post, research lab and class room.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: Dan Jones discovers the ruins of Roman Londinium.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: Dr Suzannah Lipscomb enters Henry VIII's pleasure palace.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: The hosts arrive as the Great Fire almost wipes the city out.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: How the Crossrail will propel the capital into the future.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Royal London Hospital
programme.desc: The Royal London Hospital pioneered medical breakthroughs.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Orford Ness: Defence of the Realm
programme.desc: Orford Ness is a lens into an era of secrets and superpowers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Thailand
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!
programme.desc: It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.desc: Arthur always seems to wreck things, and this time it's Mom's computer. Can he get it fixed before Mom finds out? Then, Muffy A. Crosswire and Francine are absolute best friends, despite their rather obvious differences.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed
programme.desc: Binky spends the day with Bitzi Baxter and learns what it's like to be a news reporter. Then, D.W., Bud, and Rapty set out to solve the mystery of what really happened to D.W.'s snowball.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Dunkirk (September 1, 1939)
programme.desc: To keep France free, 400,000 English soldiers have manned the battlefields. Germany's strength is too great and pushes the British to the coast town of Dunkirk.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Fall of Poland
programme.desc: German tanks roll into Poland in September 1939.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Battle of Norway (Early 1940)
programme.desc: Early in the war, the Germans decide they need to guarantee access to the Norwegian port of Narvik to ensure their supplies of Swedish iron ore. The British, however, send destroyers to up-end the German plan.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Bombing of England (Fall 1940)
programme.desc: After invading France, Hitler is planning to cross the Channel. His only obstacle is the Royal Air Force. Throughout the summer of 1940, both sides lose an incredible number of daring flyers.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Battle of Tobruk
programme.desc: German field marshal Erwin Rommel scores a major victory at the Libyan seaport of Tobruk.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Operation Mercury
programme.desc: After British forces withdrew in defeat from Greece to the island of Crete in early 1941, they were soon fighting German invasion armies again. This time, 5,000 of Hitler's elite paratroopers landed to complete their conquest in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Battle of Malta (June 1941)
programme.desc: In 1941, Mussolini desperately wants to wrest the tiny island of Malta from the British for control of the Mediterranean. When his inadequate air force fails to bomb the Maltese into submission, Hitler's Luftwaffe joins the campaign.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: The Fall of Singapore (October 1941)
programme.desc: Before the sneak attack on Pearl Harbor, the Japanese initiate the Pacific War by firing on the British in Malaya. Their route to the rubber-rich nation takes them into Singapore, the World's most armed fortress.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Pearl Harbor (December 7, 1941)
programme.desc: During a two-hour surprise attack on the American Pacific fleet anchored at Pearl Harbor, Japanese navy pilots score a near-complete victory.

programme.title: BATTLEFRONT: WWII ROAD TO VICTORY: Fall of the Philippines
programme.desc: Examining the Japanese invasion of the Philippines in December 1941.

programme.desc: When the dinos discover a bunch of animals run amok all over Megalopolis, they wonder why these animals have fled from the woods and entered the city. Kane figures that Skor must have something to do with it.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Under VRAINS
programme.desc: Ghost Gal ventures into the vast underbelly of LINK VRAINS and uncovers a sinister secret the Hanoi have been hiding!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Venturing into a Shadow Geyser in their pursuit of Korg and Zed – who transformed Orwin into a Shadow Magi and took him down to the Core to serve Agram - Tony, Edyn and Strag drop into a nightmarish maze inside the geyser.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop get into a debate of which is better: the sun or the wind. Rachel learns that the park is not only a place to come and play but it's also the home of many different creatures.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Badd Time

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman - Again!
programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps
programme.desc: Krang uses Big Louie to steal anti-freeze to try to start the Technodrome, now stuck in the Arctic. Shredder zaps Turtle pal Napoleon Bullfrog, with mutagen, who mutates into a giant monster and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With a surge of power, Vegeta attacks Beerus; Beerus challenges Oolong to rock-paper-scissors to give Earth a second chance.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Holding the powers of a Super Saiyan God, Goku tries to face Beerus. Goku proves to be a true challenge, forcing the god to take him seriously.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Seemingly in control of his powers, Goku escalates the battle. Beerus' power does not fade, and he continues to hit Goku.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
